title: Barista benchmark manifest (Bench.toml)
description: Per-project benchmark manifest. Authored as TOML; this schema describes the equivalent JSON document so external validators can check manifests without parsing TOML. Field naming matches `barista-bench` Rust types.

schema.description: Schema discriminator. Bump the trailing `vN` to introduce a breaking change.

id.description: Stable identifier for this benchmark target.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for dashboards and reports.

category.description: Kind of benchmark target. `microbench` for Tier-1 in-process benches; `corpus` for Tier-2/3 reference projects.

corpus_id.description: Optional foreign key into the project corpus directory.

command.description: Default command line invoked under measurement when `baselines` is absent/empty. When `baselines` is non-empty, each baseline's `command` is used instead and this field is informational.

id.description: Stable lowercase kebab-case identifier; echoed into `results.json::baseline_id`.

command.description: Argv-style command line; shell features (&&, |, $VAR) are NOT supported.

prepare.description: Optional argv-style command run before each measured iteration (e.g. `rm -rf target`); its wall-clock time is NOT included in the measurement.

baselines.description: Optional cross-tool baselines. One results.json document is emitted per (manifest, baseline).

metrics.description: Metrics the harness captures per iteration. Known values: `wall_ms`, `cpu_user_ms`, `cpu_sys_ms`, `peak_rss_kb`, `network_bytes`, `disk_read_bytes`, `disk_write_bytes`. Producers may emit additional metric names; consumers should ignore unknown entries.

hardware_tier.description: Hardware tier this manifest targets. 1 = local developer; 2 = self-hosted CI runner; 3 = public reference hardware.

iteration_spacing_seconds.description: Seconds to sleep between successive iterations (warmup AND measured). Cold-cache manifests opt into a non-zero value to space real-network iterations under the upstream rate-limit threshold (Maven Central HTTP 429 on rapid ~438-request cold pulls is the documented case). Default 0 = no spacing.

allowed_variance.description: Per-metric variance budget enforced by the regression gate.

labels.description: Free-form labels attached to dashboard rows.

cache_isolation.description: Per-iteration cache strategy. `none` shares the caller's caches across iterations (warm scenario). `per-iteration` allocates a fresh tempdir per iteration and routes barista (BARISTA_PATHS__CACHE_DIR) and mvn/mvnd (MAVEN_OPTS=-Dmaven.repo.local=...) to it (cold scenario; PRD §17.10 D1/D4).
